notes: v1.8 - The screensaver is now a remote: tap album art to skip, swipe for prev/next, double-tap the clock to wake. Track history (last ~20 tracks with thumbnails) on the full now-playing card, and album art crossfades between tracks. A full-panel settings search in the control deck (~40 sections, ranked results, browse-by-tab, popular chips). Status-strip extras from the same Open-Meteo poll (wind, UV, severe-weather alert) and finance ticker watchlists (finance:crypto:BTC,ETH or finance:stocks:AAPL,TSLA). Vector transport buttons, a seek-jump visualizer pulse (no mic), strip tap actions (app menu, ntfy preview), widget safe zones, a post-boot nav warning, and the experimental live-audio reactor moved to Settings -> Labs. See CHANGELOG.md for details.
